finding_results.notes: Agnes's roommate now appears as Doris in both chapter-17 references, removing the collision with the separately established Mrs. Delacroix in Room 110.

The chapter contains no repeated Prasad workload formula. The only remaining Dr. Prasad mention is an indirect chart comparison rather than a re-introduction built on the earlier 'forty patients' summary.
Agnes is re-entered through her silence and arrested hand behavior instead of a repeated inventory of height, hair, and glasses.

Retained one consequential cough beat with escalation and the handkerchief tell, then converted later recurrence into breathing pressure and Carmen's clinical follow-through rather than additional cough descriptions.
Corrected Agnes's roommate name to Doris so Mrs. Delacroix remains exclusive to the Room 110 continuity track.

summary: Revised chapter 17 in place to remove the roommate-name collision, cut Agnes's repeated physical re-introduction, reduce Earl's health recurrence to a single escalated cough beat with clinical aftermath, and keep Dr. Prasad free of the repeated workload tag in this chapter.
